title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Narayana Health
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
